result.markdown:
--- title: "112: Conference Shapes" date: "2024-10-15" categories: - geom_density format: html: code-fold: true code-summary: "Code" editor: visual --- ### Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(cbbplotR) library(rlang) cfb_ratings <- readr::read_csv("cfb_ratings.csv") |> dplyr::select(-1) conf_stats <- readr::read_csv("conf_stats.csv") |> dplyr::select(-1) # order the conferences conf_order <- conf_stats |> dplyr::pull(conf) conf_stats <- conf_stats |> dplyr::mutate(conf = factor(conf, levels = conf_order)) |> dplyr::arrange(conf) ``` ::: ### Density plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} conf_density <- cfb_ratings |> dplyr::filter(!conf %in% c("Pac-2", "Independents")) |> dplyr::mutate(conf = forcats::fct_relevel(conf, conf_order)) |> ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = f_plus_ptile, fill = conf)) + ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.7) + ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ conf, scales = "free_y") + ggplot2::geom_vline(data = conf_stats, ggplot2::aes(xintercept = mean_f_plus_ptile), linetype = "dashed", color = "#333333") + ggplot2::geom_label(data = conf_stats, ggplot2::aes(x = mean_f_plus_ptile, y = Inf, label = sprintf("%.0f%%", mean_f_plus_ptile * 100)), hjust = -0.1, vjust = 3, fill = "floral white", color = "#333333", size = 4) + hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc() + ggplot2::labs( title = "FBS Conference Shapes", subtitle = "Shows distribution of F+ rating percentiles sorted by average percentile.
F+ ratings are a combination between Brian Fremeau's FEI ratings and Bill Connelly's SP+ ratings.", x = "F+ Rating Percentile", y = "", caption = "October 15, 2024 \nPlot by Chris (@dadgumboxscores) | Bless your chart", x = "", ) + ggplot2::theme( legend.position = "none", strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "lightgray"), strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"), axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_blank(), axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_blank(), plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown() ) + ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))( length(unique(cfb_ratings$conf)))) + ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) ggplot2::ggsave( "conf_density_plot.png", conf_density, w = 10.5, h = 8.5, dpi = 600, type = 'cairo' ) conf_density ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](byc_112_conf_shapes_files/figure-html/geom_density-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ###
